title: Horizon Line, Evening
artist_persona: A landscape painter working in the romantic tradition
description: An atmospheric landscape that extends the intimately scaled ceiling into an imagined horizon. Layers of #030301, #1f160e, and #4c3b2a recede into the distance, creating the illusion of a living room opening onto a wider vista. The cozy soft treatment aligns with the room's existing warm light sources, making the piece feel like a natural extension of the space.
artwork_rationale: This piece responds to the room's Mid Century Modern architecture (high confidence) with its subtle composition. The intimately scaled ceiling (3.2m) and cozy soft lighting conditions informed the scale and contrast. At 3.8m viewing distance, the large statement format fills the optimal field of view.
color_rationale: The palette draws from the room's dominant #030301 and accent #1f160e tones, ensuring analogous harmony with the existing warm interior. The medium vibrancy level matches the room's subdued character.
image_prompt: A high-end digital artwork titled 'Horizon Line, Evening', large statement format. An atmospheric landscape that extends the intimately scaled ceiling into an imagined horizon. Layers of #030301, #1f160e, and #4c3b2a recede into the distance, creating the illusion of a living room opening onto a wider vista. The cozy soft treatment aligns with the room's existing warm light sources, making the piece feel like a natural extension of the space. The piece is museum-quality, suitable for a luxury interior. Color palette centered on #030301 with #1f160e accents. Style: expansive serene. The artwork should feel like a commissioned gallery piece — not generic, not templated, but intentionally made for this specific room with Mid Century Modern architecture.

recommended_frame.description: A charcoal-stained wood gallery profile frame with a matte ebonized finish that creates a window-like transition between the room and the imagined landscape beyond.

recommended_lighting.description: Twin adjustable picture lights with 30° beams, mounted at 45° angles from each top corner. The warm 2700K light enriches the atmospheric depth.

recommended_placement: Above the primary seating area, positioned to be the first piece seen when entering the room
